info.description: User management API with Passkeys (WebAuthn) authentication
info.title: WeChat Task API

get.description: Returns project details and available API documentation link

post.description: Complete WebAuthn login by verifying the assertion response
Generate WebAuthn registration options. User must provide a username.
Complete WebAuthn registration by verifying the credential response

get.description: List all bots belonging to the authenticated user, including their channels

post.description: Create a new bot with a name. Channels can be added separately.

get.description: Get a bot by ID with its channels

put.description: Update a bot's name and description (both optional)

delete.description: Delete a bot by ID (cascades to channels)

get.description: List all channels for a bot

post.description: Create a Lark webhook channel for a bot. Requires a webhook_url and optional secret.
Create a WeChat clawbot channel for a bot. Returns a QR code for the user to scan.
Send a text message to a specific channel

get.description: Returns the health status of the service and database connectivity
Get all skills created by the current user
Get all skill subscriptions of the current user

delete.description: Unsubscribe from a skill by skill ID

put.description: Update authenticated user's profile (username and/or icon)

content.description: Markdown content following Anthropic skill format

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
